description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a rectangular frame and straight, clean lines. The sofa is upholstered in a light gray, textured fabric that covers both the seat and back cushions, as well as the armrests and backrest. It has three loose, plush back cushions and three matching seat cushions, all of which appear uniform in size and shape. The armrests are straight and at the same height as the backrest, providing a boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on four slender, black metal legs positioned at each corner, giving it a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The overall look is contemporary and versatile, suitable for urban parks, public seating areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A contemporary three-seater sofa with light gray textured upholstery, straight armrests, and slim black metal legs. It features three loose seat and back cushions for a clean, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, boxy armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous upholstered backrest and the slim black legs at each corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, emphasizing the sofa's rectangular form.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniform seat cushions and three matching loose back cushions arranged in a single row, all similarly sized and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in the same fabric, with a minimalist, unadorned profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, straight black metal legs positioned at each corner, exposed and slightly elevating the sofa above the ground.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three loose, uniform back cushions, continuous across the width of the sofa, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light gray fabric with a subtle, woven texture; solid color with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
